Title: Merchant initiated and recurring flagging
Content:
Merchant initiated transactions require additional approval from our risk team

Due to the high risk of fraud, we by default do not allow merchant initiated transactions to take place. To enable merchant initiated transactions, request recurring payments from from the Xendit Dashboard.

This guide describes how to charge merchant initiated transactions (with recurring indicators) without using Xendit issued tokens.

Merchant initiated transaction indicators

There are several fields that can be used for recurring flagging:

Card on file type

"channel_properties": {
    "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING", "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED", "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED"
}

card_on_file_type - can have the following values:

RECURRING - This transaction is expected to happen on a recurring basis, subscriptions to a service, for example.

MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED - This transaction can happen any time, at different amounts, whenever the merchant initiates the transaction.

CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED - Use for tokenized cards (Pay and save)

Transaction sequence

"channel_properties": {
     "transaction_sequence": "INITIAL", "SUBSEQUENT"

transaction_sequence - can have the following values:

INITIAL - first time transaction

SUBSEQUENT - any follow up transaction, also used when switching between providers

Recurring configuration

For recurring transactions, additional configuration is required, both recurring_expiry and recurring_frequency are scheme mandated fields

"channel_properties": {
    "recurring_configuration" : {
        "recurring_expiry": "YYYY-MM-DD", // The expiry date of the contract
        "recurring_frequency": 30 // The days in between each charge, for unscheduled pass "1"
    }
}

Initial unscheduled merchant initiated transaction

The first transaction of a merchant initiated transaction requires the transaction to be flagged as INITIAL:

transaction_sequence : "INITIAL" - the first time we are setting up the “contract” between the shopper and your product.

Perform the payment request:

Set up an unscheduled merchant initiated transaction (customer initiated, first time):

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "skip_three_ds": false // We recommend not to skip 3DS (risk and liability)
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "New PC",
    "description": "Your description",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "Any meta data"
    }
}

Subsequent transactions

Follow up transactions has to be flagged SUBSEQUENT

We have created a “contract” between the shopper and the merchant and are now charing a previously stored card.

For subsequent transactions make sure to pass the card_on_file_type , network_transaction_id in the channel_properties object

 "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": null,
        "failure_return_url": null,
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511"
...

Alphanumeric Network transaction ID resulting in error

On test, the returned network_transaction_id is alphanumeric. This reflects actual network_transaction_id’s.

When using this network_transaction_id, it will result in processor error.

To circumvent this issue on test, pass a numeric character (can be random); 12123456789012

Merchant unscheduled transaction sample

Sample request to follow up the merchant unscheduled transaction:

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 115100,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511", // numerical on test
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "testing goodds",
    "description": "this should have the proper ntid",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    }
}

Initial recurring transaction

First time recurring transaction. Ideally we do request 3DS2 for a first time recurring contract:

  1. Create the payment request with the recurring configuration in place
    Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "recurring_configuration": {
            "recurring_expiry": "2028-12-10",
            "recurring_frequency" : 30
        },
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "LastName",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success"
    },
    "statement_descriptor": "30 day subscription",
    "description": "Recurring sample"
}

  1. Redirect to the authentication page

    Redirect your customer to the authentication page provided by the action_url from the response object. This is where the cardholder completes the 3D Secure authentication.

  2. Fetch the transaction details and store the network_transaction id

    Follow this guide to retrieve the payment details.

    Alphanumeric Network transaction ID resulting in error

    On test, the returned network_transaction_id is alphanumeric. This reflects actual network_transaction_id’s.

    When using this network_transaction_id, it will result in processor error.

    To circumvent this issue on test, pass a numeric character (can be random); 12123456789012

Follow up recurring transaction

The follow up transaction would (in this case) be expected to be charged 30 days later.

  1. Create the follow up payment request with the network_transaction_id field
    Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 50000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "Name",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "network_transaction_id": "12123456789012"
    },
    "statement_descriptor": "Your subscription",
    "description": "Recurring MIT follow up transaction"
}

  1. This transaction has now been authorized.
    Make sure to receive the webhook or fetch the transaction details

Title: Penandaan transaksi yang diinisiasi merchant dan berulang
Content:
Transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh merchant memerlukan persetujuan tambahan dari tim risiko kami

Karena tingginya risiko penipuan, secara default kami tidak mengizinkan transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh merchant terjadi. Untuk mengaktifkan transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh merchant, ajukan permintaan pembayaran berulang dari Xendit Dashboard.

Panduan ini menjelaskan cara menagih transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh merchant (dengan indikator berulang) tanpa menggunakan token yang diterbitkan Xendit.

Indikator transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh merchant

Ada beberapa kolom yang dapat digunakan untuk penandaan berulang:

Jenis kartu yang tersimpan

"channel_properties": {
    "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING", "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED", "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED"
}

card_on_file_type - dapat memiliki nilai-nilai berikut:

RECURRING - Transaksi ini diharapkan terjadi secara berulang, misalnya, langganan suatu layanan.

MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED - Transaksi ini dapat terjadi kapan saja, dengan jumlah yang berbeda, setiap kali merchant menginisiasi transaksi.

CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED - Gunakan untuk kartu yang ditokenisasi (Bayar dan simpan)

Urutan transaksi

"channel_properties": {
     "transaction_sequence": "INITIAL", "SUBSEQUENT"

transaction_sequence - dapat memiliki nilai-nilai berikut:

INITIAL - transaksi pertama kali

SUBSEQUENT - setiap transaksi lanjutan, juga digunakan saat beralih antar penyedia

Konfigurasi berulang

Untuk transaksi berulang, diperlukan konfigurasi tambahan, baik recurring_expiry maupun recurring_frequency adalah kolom yang diwajibkan oleh skema

"channel_properties": {
    "recurring_configuration" : {
        "recurring_expiry": "YYYY-MM-DD", // Tanggal kedaluwarsa kontrak
        "recurring_frequency": 30 // Jumlah hari di antara setiap penagihan, untuk yang tidak terjadwal, teruskan "1"
    }
}

Transaksi awal tidak terjadwal yang diinisiasi oleh merchant

Transaksi pertama dari transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh merchant mengharuskan transaksi tersebut ditandai sebagai INITIAL:

transaction_sequence : "INITIAL" - pertama kali kami menyiapkan "kontrak" antara pembeli dan produk Anda.

Lakukan permintaan pembayaran:

Siapkan transaksi tidak terjadwal yang diinisiasi oleh merchant (diinisiasi oleh pelanggan, pertama kali):

Permintaan - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "skip_three_ds": false // Kami merekomendasikan untuk tidak melewati 3DS (risiko dan tanggung jawab)
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "New PC",
    "description": "Your description",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "Any meta data"
    }
}

Transaksi selanjutnya

Transaksi lanjutan harus ditandai SUBSEQUENT

Kami telah membuat "kontrak" antara pembeli dan merchant dan sekarang menagih kartu yang disimpan sebelumnya.

Untuk transaksi selanjutnya, pastikan untuk meneruskan card_on_file_type , network_transaction_id di dalam objek channel_properties

 "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": null,
        "failure_return_url": null,
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511"
...

ID transaksi Jaringan alfanumerik yang mengakibatkan kesalahan

Pada mode tes, network_transaction_id yang dikembalikan bersifat alfanumerik. Ini mencerminkan network_transaction_id yang sebenarnya.

Saat menggunakan network_transaction_id ini, akan mengakibatkan kesalahan prosesor.

Untuk mengatasi masalah ini pada mode tes, teruskan karakter numerik (bisa acak); 12123456789012

Contoh transaksi tidak terjadwal oleh merchant

Contoh permintaan untuk menindaklanjuti transaksi tidak terjadwal oleh merchant:

Permintaan - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 115100,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511", // numerik pada mode tes
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "testing goodds",
    "description": "this should have the proper ntid",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    }
}

Transaksi berulang awal

Transaksi berulang pertama kali. Idealnya kami meminta 3DS2 untuk kontrak berulang pertama kali:

  1. Buat permintaan pembayaran dengan konfigurasi berulang yang sudah ada
    Permintaan - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "recurring_configuration": {
            "recurring_expiry": "2028-12-10",
            "recurring_frequency" : 30
        },
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "LastName",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success"
    },
    "statement_descriptor": "30 day subscription",
    "description": "Recurring sample"
}

  1. Arahkan ke halaman autentikasi

    Arahkan pelanggan Anda ke halaman autentikasi yang disediakan oleh action_url dari objek respons. Di sinilah pemegang kartu menyelesaikan autentikasi 3D Secure.

  2. Ambil detail transaksi dan simpan network_transaction id

    Ikuti panduan ini untuk mengambil detail pembayaran.

    ID transaksi Jaringan alfanumerik yang mengakibatkan kesalahan

    Pada mode tes, network_transaction_id yang dikembalikan bersifat alfanumerik. Ini mencerminkan network_transaction_id yang sebenarnya.

    Saat menggunakan network_transaction_id ini, akan mengakibatkan kesalahan prosesor.

    Untuk mengatasi masalah ini pada mode tes, teruskan karakter numerik (bisa acak); 12123456789012

Transaksi berulang lanjutan

Transaksi lanjutan (dalam kasus ini) diharapkan akan ditagih 30 hari kemudian.

  1. Buat permintaan pembayaran lanjutan dengan kolom network_transaction_id
    Permintaan - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 50000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "Name",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "network_transaction_id": "12123456789012"
    },
    "statement_descriptor": "Your subscription",
    "description": "Recurring MIT follow up transaction"
}

  1. Transaksi ini sekarang telah diotorisasi.
    Pastikan untuk menerima webhook atau mengambil detail transaksi
SeoTitle: Penandaan transaksi yang diinisiasi merchant dan berulang

Title:
**Merchant initiated and recurring flagging**

Based on the search results, the term "Merchant initiated and recurring flagging" refers to the process of setting indicators (flags) on a transaction to specify that it is either:
1.  **Merchant Initiated Transaction (MIT):** A payment initiated by the merchant without the customer's direct involvement for that specific transaction (e.g., for unscheduled charges like account top-ups).
2.  **Recurring:** A payment that is part of a fixed, scheduled subscription (e.g., monthly membership fee).

The Thai translation should convey the technical meaning of setting indicators for these two types of transactions.

*   **Merchant initiated transaction:** ธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้า (Thurakam thī riroem dōi rānkhā)
*   **Recurring:** การชำระเงินแบบเกิดซ้ำ (Kān chamra ngoen baep koet sam) or simply เกิดซ้ำ (Koet sam)
*   **Flagging:** การระบุ/การกำหนดตัวบ่งชี้ (Kān rabu/kān kamnot tūa bongchī) or การกำหนดสถานะ (Kān kamnot sathāna)

A professional and concise translation for technical documentation would be:

**การกำหนดสถานะธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าและธุรกรรมแบบเกิดซ้ำ** (Kān kamnot sathāna thurakam thī riroem dōi rānkhā lae thurakam baep koet sam)

Or, more concisely, using the common technical term for "flagging" in this context:

**การระบุสถานะธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าและธุรกรรมแบบเกิดซ้ำ**
Content:
ธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้า (Merchant initiated transactions) ต้องได้รับการอนุมัติเพิ่มเติมจากทีมความเสี่ยงของเรา

เนื่องจากมีความเสี่ยงสูงต่อการฉ้อโกง โดยค่าเริ่มต้น เราจึงไม่อนุญาตให้มีการทำธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้า หากต้องการเปิดใช้งานธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้า โปรดส่งคำขอการชำระเงินแบบ Recurring จาก Xendit Dashboard

คู่มือนี้อธิบายวิธีการเรียกเก็บเงินสำหรับธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้า (พร้อมตัวบ่งชี้ Recurring) โดยไม่ต้องใช้โทเคน (tokens) ที่ออกโดย Xendit

ตัวบ่งชี้ธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้า

มีหลายฟิลด์ที่สามารถใช้สำหรับการระบุว่าเป็น Recurring ได้:

ประเภทบัตรที่บันทึกไว้ (Card on file type)

"channel_properties": {
    "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING", "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED", "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED"
}

card_on_file_type - สามารถมีค่าดังต่อไปนี้:

RECURRING - ธุรกรรมนี้คาดว่าจะเกิดขึ้นเป็นประจำ เช่น การสมัครสมาชิกบริการ

MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED - ธุรกรรมนี้สามารถเกิดขึ้นได้ทุกเมื่อ ด้วยจำนวนเงินที่แตกต่างกัน เมื่อใดก็ตามที่ร้านค้าเป็นผู้ริเริ่มธุรกรรม

CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED - ใช้สำหรับบัตรที่ถูกแปลงเป็นโทเคน (Pay and save)

ลำดับธุรกรรม (Transaction sequence)

"channel_properties": {
     "transaction_sequence": "INITIAL", "SUBSEQUENT"

transaction_sequence - สามารถมีค่าดังต่อไปนี้:

INITIAL - ธุรกรรมครั้งแรก

SUBSEQUENT - ธุรกรรมติดตามผลใดๆ และยังใช้เมื่อมีการเปลี่ยนผู้ให้บริการ

การตั้งค่า Recurring (Recurring configuration)

สำหรับธุรกรรม Recurring จำเป็นต้องมีการตั้งค่าเพิ่มเติม โดยทั้ง recurring_expiry และ recurring_frequency เป็นฟิลด์ที่กำหนดโดย Scheme

"channel_properties": {
    "recurring_configuration" : {
        "recurring_expiry": "YYYY-MM-DD", // The expiry date of the contract
        "recurring_frequency": 30 // The days in between each charge, for unscheduled pass "1"
    }
}

ธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าแบบไม่กำหนดเวลาครั้งแรก (Initial unscheduled merchant initiated transaction)

ธุรกรรมแรกของธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าจำเป็นต้องถูกระบุว่าเป็น INITIAL:

transaction_sequence : "INITIAL" - เป็นครั้งแรกที่เรากำลังตั้งค่า "สัญญา" ระหว่างผู้ซื้อกับผลิตภัณฑ์ของคุณ

ดำเนินการร้องขอการชำระเงิน:

ตั้งค่าธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าแบบไม่กำหนดเวลา (ริเริ่มโดยลูกค้า, ครั้งแรก):

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "skip_three_ds": false // We recommend not to skip 3DS (risk and liability)
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "New PC",
    "description": "Your description",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "Any meta data"
    }
}

ธุรกรรมติดตามผล (Subsequent transactions)

ธุรกรรมติดตามผลจะต้องถูกระบุว่าเป็น SUBSEQUENT

เราได้สร้าง "สัญญา" ระหว่างผู้ซื้อและร้านค้าแล้ว และตอนนี้กำลังเรียกเก็บเงินจากบัตรที่ถูกจัดเก็บไว้ก่อนหน้านี้

สำหรับธุรกรรมติดตามผล โปรดตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่าได้ส่ง card_on_file_type และ network_transaction_id ในออบเจกต์ channel_properties

 "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": null,
        "failure_return_url": null,
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511"
...

Network transaction ID ที่เป็นตัวอักษรและตัวเลขอาจทำให้เกิดข้อผิดพลาด

ในโหมดทดสอบ (test) network_transaction_id ที่ส่งคืนจะเป็นตัวอักษรและตัวเลข ซึ่งสะท้อนถึง network_transaction_id ที่เกิดขึ้นจริง

เมื่อใช้ network_transaction_id นี้ อาจทำให้เกิดข้อผิดพลาดของ Processor

เพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงปัญหานี้ในโหมดทดสอบ ให้ส่งค่าที่เป็นตัวเลข (สามารถเป็นค่าสุ่มได้); 12123456789012

ตัวอย่างธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าแบบไม่กำหนดเวลา

ตัวอย่างคำขอเพื่อติดตามผลธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าแบบไม่กำหนดเวลา:

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 115100,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511", // numerical on test
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "testing goodds",
    "description": "this should have the proper ntid",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    }
}

ธุรกรรม Recurring ครั้งแรก (Initial recurring transaction)

ธุรกรรม Recurring ครั้งแรก โดยหลักการแล้ว เราควรร้องขอ 3DS2 สำหรับสัญญา Recurring ครั้งแรก:

  1. สร้างคำขอการชำระเงินพร้อมกับการตั้งค่า recurring configuration
    Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "recurring_configuration": {
            "recurring_expiry": "2028-12-10",
            "recurring_frequency" : 30
        },
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "LastName",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success"
    },
    "statement_descriptor": "30 day subscription",
    "description": "Recurring sample"
}

  1. เปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยังหน้าการยืนยันตัวตน (authentication page)

    เปลี่ยนเส้นทางลูกค้าของคุณไปยัง authentication page ที่ระบุโดย action_url จาก response object นี่คือที่ที่ผู้ถือบัตรจะดำเนินการยืนยันตัวตน 3D Secure ให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์

  2. ดึงรายละเอียดธุรกรรมและจัดเก็บ network_transaction id

    ทำตาม คู่มือนี้ เพื่อดึงรายละเอียดการชำระเงิน

    Network transaction ID ที่เป็นตัวอักษรและตัวเลขอาจทำให้เกิดข้อผิดพลาด

    ในโหมดทดสอบ (test) network_transaction_id ที่ส่งคืนจะเป็นตัวอักษรและตัวเลข ซึ่งสะท้อนถึง network_transaction_id ที่เกิดขึ้นจริง

    เมื่อใช้ network_transaction_id นี้ อาจทำให้เกิดข้อผิดพลาดของ Processor

    เพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงปัญหานี้ในโหมดทดสอบ ให้ส่งค่าที่เป็นตัวเลข (สามารถเป็นค่าสุ่มได้); 12123456789012

ธุรกรรม Recurring ติดตามผล (Follow up recurring transaction)

ธุรกรรมติดตามผล (ในกรณีนี้) คาดว่าจะถูกเรียกเก็บเงินใน 30 วันถัดไป

  1. สร้างคำขอการชำระเงินติดตามผลพร้อมฟิลด์ network_transaction_id
    Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 50000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "Name",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "network_transaction_id": "12123456789012"
    },
    "statement_descriptor": "Your subscription",
    "description": "Recurring MIT follow up transaction"
}

  1. ขณะนี้ธุรกรรมนี้ได้รับการอนุมัติแล้ว
    โปรดตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่าได้รับ webhook หรือดึงรายละเอียดธุรกรรม
SeoTitle:
**Merchant initiated and recurring flagging**

Based on the search results, the term "Merchant initiated and recurring flagging" refers to the process of setting indicators (flags) on a transaction to specify that it is either:
1.  **Merchant Initiated Transaction (MIT):** A payment initiated by the merchant without the customer's direct involvement for that specific transaction (e.g., for unscheduled charges like account top-ups).
2.  **Recurring:** A payment that is part of a fixed, scheduled subscription (e.g., monthly membership fee).

The Thai translation should convey the technical meaning of setting indicators for these two types of transactions.

*   **Merchant initiated transaction:** ธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้า (Thurakam thī riroem dōi rānkhā)
*   **Recurring:** การชำระเงินแบบเกิดซ้ำ (Kān chamra ngoen baep koet sam) or simply เกิดซ้ำ (Koet sam)
*   **Flagging:** การระบุ/การกำหนดตัวบ่งชี้ (Kān rabu/kān kamnot tūa bongchī) or การกำหนดสถานะ (Kān kamnot sathāna)

A professional and concise translation for technical documentation would be:

**การกำหนดสถานะธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าและธุรกรรมแบบเกิดซ้ำ** (Kān kamnot sathāna thurakam thī riroem dōi rānkhā lae thurakam baep koet sam)

Or, more concisely, using the common technical term for "flagging" in this context:

**การระบุสถานะธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยร้านค้าและธุรกรรมแบบเกิดซ้ำ**

Title: Marcado de iniciado por el Comercio y recurrente
Content:
Las transacciones iniciadas por el Comercio requieren aprobación adicional de nuestro equipo de riesgo

Debido al alto riesgo de fraude, por defecto no permitimos que se realicen transacciones iniciadas por el Comercio. Para habilitar las transacciones iniciadas por el Comercio, solicite Pagos recurrentes desde el Xendit Dashboard.

Esta guía describe cómo cobrar transacciones iniciadas por el Comercio (con indicadores recurrentes) sin utilizar tokens emitidos por Xendit.

Indicadores de transacciones iniciadas por el Comercio

Hay varios campos que se pueden utilizar para el marcado recurrente:

Tipo de tarjeta en archivo (Card on file type)

"channel_properties": {
    "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING", "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED", "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED"
}

card_on_file_type - puede tener los siguientes valores:

RECURRING - Se espera que esta Transacción ocurra de forma recurrente, por ejemplo, suscripciones a un servicio.

MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED - Esta Transacción puede ocurrir en cualquier momento, con Montos diferentes, cuando el Comercio inicie la Transacción.

CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED - Se utiliza para tarjetas tokenizadas (Pagar y guardar)

Secuencia de Transacción (Transaction sequence)

"channel_properties": {
     "transaction_sequence": "INITIAL", "SUBSEQUENT"

transaction_sequence - puede tener los siguientes valores:

INITIAL - Transacción por primera vez

SUBSEQUENT - cualquier Transacción de seguimiento, también utilizada al cambiar entre proveedores

Configuración recurrente

Para las transacciones recurrentes, se requiere una configuración adicional; tanto recurring_expiry como recurring_frequency son campos obligatorios por el esquema

"channel_properties": {
    "recurring_configuration" : {
        "recurring_expiry": "YYYY-MM-DD", // La Fecha de expiración del contrato
        "recurring_frequency": 30 // Los días entre cada cobro, para no programado pase "1"
    }
}

Transacción inicial no programada iniciada por el Comercio

La primera Transacción de una Transacción iniciada por el Comercio requiere que la Transacción se marque como INITIAL:

transaction_sequence : "INITIAL" - la primera vez que establecemos el "contrato" entre el comprador y su producto.

Realice el request de Pago:

Configure una Transacción no programada iniciada por el Comercio (iniciada por el Cliente, por primera vez):

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "skip_three_ds": false // Recomendamos no omitir 3DS (riesgo y responsabilidad)
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "New PC",
    "description": "Your description",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "Any meta data"
    }
}

Transacciones subsecuentes

Las transacciones de seguimiento deben marcarse como SUBSEQUENT

Hemos creado un "contrato" entre el comprador y el Comercio y ahora estamos cobrando una tarjeta previamente almacenada.

Para las transacciones subsecuentes, asegúrese de pasar card_on_file_type y network_transaction_id en el object channel_properties

 "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": null,
        "failure_return_url": null,
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511"
...

ID de Transacción de Network alfanumérico que resulta en Error

En la prueba, el network_transaction_id devuelto es alfanumérico. Esto refleja los network_transaction_id reales.

Al utilizar este network_transaction_id, resultará en un Error del procesador.

Para evitar este problema en la prueba, pase un carácter numérico (puede ser aleatorio); 12123456789012

Ejemplo de Transacción no programada del Comercio

Ejemplo de request para dar seguimiento a la Transacción no programada del Comercio:

Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 115100,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
                "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
                "cardholder_email": "shopper@shopper.co",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "MERCHANT_UNSCHEDULED",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "network_transaction_id": "1251251511", // numérico en prueba
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "testing goodds",
    "description": "this should have the proper ntid",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    }
}

Transacción recurrente inicial

Transacción recurrente por primera vez. Idealmente, solicitamos 3DS2 para un contrato recurrente por primera vez:

  1. Cree el request de Pago con la configuración recurrente establecida
    Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "recurring_configuration": {
            "recurring_expiry": "2028-12-10",
            "recurring_frequency" : 30
        },
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cvn": "123",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "LastName",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"INITIAL",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success"
    },
    "statement_descriptor": "30 day subscription",
    "description": "Recurring sample"
}

  1. Redirigir a la página de authentication

    Redirija a su Cliente a la página de authentication proporcionada por el action_url del object response. Aquí es donde el titular de la tarjeta completa la authentication 3D Secure.

  2. Obtenga los detalles de la Transacción y almacene el network_transaction id

    Siga esta guía para obtener los detalles del Pago.

    ID de Transacción de Network alfanumérico que resulta en Error

    En la prueba, el network_transaction_id devuelto es alfanumérico. Esto refleja los network_transaction_id reales.

    Al utilizar este network_transaction_id, resultará en un Error del procesador.

    Para evitar este problema en la prueba, pase un carácter numérico (puede ser aleatorio); 12123456789012

Transacción recurrente de seguimiento

Se esperaría que la Transacción de seguimiento (en este caso) se cobrara 30 días después.

  1. Cree el request de Pago de seguimiento con el campo network_transaction_id
    Request - POST /v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 50000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "customer": {
        "reference_id": "UNIQUE_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE_ID",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "channel_properties": {
        "card_details": {
                "card_number": "4000000000001091",
                "cardholder_first_name": "Shopper",
                "cardholder_last_name": "Name",
                "cardholder_email": "example@shopper.com",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "expiry_year": "2029"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "RECURRING",
        "transaction_sequence":"SUBSEQUENT",
        "skip_three_ds": true,
        "network_transaction_id": "12123456789012"
